mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, agent_id, file_name, file_type, chunk_strategy, chunk_count, status, create_time, update_time FROM rag_document WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
SELECT id, document_id, agent_id, file_name, file_type, chunk_strategy, chunk_count, status, create_time, update_time FROM rag_document WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
